news.headline: Ether traders see 'larger bounce' after ETH price taps $2.2K
Son of U.S. government contractor, accused of stealing millions in seized crypto, arrested in France
38% of altcoins near all-time lows, worse than FTX crash: Analyst
Sanctions evasions using crypto increased by 700% in 2025: Chainalysis
Core Scientific secures up to $1B credit from Morgan Stanley for data centers
CleanSpark sold 97% of February bitcoin production to fund AI pivot
SoFi taps BitGo to provide infrastructure for bank-issued stablecoin
Crypto for Advisors: Tokenization offers always-on global investment access
FBI arrests custody company CEO‘s son over alleged $46M crypto theft
Bitcoin pulls back to near $71,000 even as software sector soars

news.summary: Flux d’actualites globalement mitige mais legerement negatif: hausse des cas d’evasion de sanctions, arrestation liee a un vol crypto et recul de plusieurs actifs, malgre quelqu...

reddit.summary: Sentiment Reddit legerement negatif et assez coherent sur les majors: BTC, ETH, OP, ADA, SOL et DOGE en territoire negatif; seule BNB ressort legerement positive, XRP/AVAX neutres.

combined.summary: Sentiment crypto global legerement bearish sur ce slot: la tonalite sociale negative moderee confirme un flux news plutot risque-off, sans signal de panique mais avec biais prud...
